name: medical clinics processing 50–100 patient records/month tool
description: For medical clinics processing 50–100 patient records/month, disorganization causes delays in patient care. We automate record organization instead of manual filing and storage of patient records.
problem_solved: Disorganized patient records leading to inefficiencies in patient care.
